title: Planet-borer
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:PlanetBorer.jpg|thumb|250px]]

'''Planet-borers''' were huge vehicles produced by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] engineers with the purpose of excavating through a [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] crust. To do this, the borer possessed a massive strong 'head' that drilled through rock and stone. Once the machine made its way through, Imperial ground forces begin to create tunnels and passageways.

==Appearances==
*[[Empire 16|''Empire'' 16]]
